T0159.title: Result Delivery
T0159.definition: In illicit data trading, synonymous with delivering results, referring to the act of the service provider returning the queried data to the buyer, marking the completion of the transaction.
T0159.description: In illicit data trading, synonymous with delivering results, referring to the act of the service provider returning the queried data to the buyer, marking the completion of the transaction.
T0159.usageExample: "Direct from the source, price: 200 RMB, results delivered in about ten minutes, affordable and cheap."
